backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage, membership management (trial, standard, premium tiers, NFT minting), and access-controlled queries/updates using a mixin-based authorization system.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — McKinley School image generation and the About Actuality Studio section — to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their styling, functionality, and role within the Actuality Studio app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, secondary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Actuality Studio app, loading Playfair Display and Space Grotesk from Google Fonts and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with index and membership routes, and an AppShell that conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal for newly authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column About section component displaying the platform description, a decorative divider, a 'View Memberships' CTA button, and side-by-side labeled images of McKinley Elementary School in 1902 and present day.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer displaying the copyright year, a terracotta heart icon, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Responsive site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links (route and anchor types), login button, and user profile icon. Handles smooth scrolling for anchor links and toggles a mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background photo, headline, and a CTA button that triggers Internet Identity login and/or creates a free 30-day trial membership before navigating to the membership page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a fixed Header, a scrollable main content area via Outlet, a decorative SVG vine divider, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Reusable login/logout button supporting default and compact variants; uses Internet Identity for authentication and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MembershipCard.t: Displays the authenticated user's membership status (unauthenticated, loading, error, no membership, trial, or active) and provides actions to start a free trial or mint an NFT membership.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown on first login that prompts the user to enter a display name and saves it via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation; cannot be dismissed without submitting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating all dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile and membership state via the backend actor, including trial and NFT membership creation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a warm autumn/spring color palette (terracotta, sage, gold) as CSS custom properties, typography rules, and utility classes for gradients, glows, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component featuring a hero section, about section, mission statement, and feature highlights for the Actuality Studio community project with decorative SVG leaf motifs.
frontend/src/pages/MembershipPage.tsx: Membership management page that shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users or the MembershipCard component for authenticated users, with decorative leaf SVG motifs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Space Grotesk, Playfair Display, Space Mono), oklch-based semantic color tokens (terracotta, sage, gold, blush, cream, etc.), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Actuality Studio project (a Dfinity Internet Computer co-housing platform), including existing features, a pending 'About' section feature request, image requirements for McKinley Elementary School illustrations, and architectural notes.
